productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Scuba Black Green Floater
description: Perfect for those who like comfort at its best, these absolutely stylish puma Scuba slippers are all set to pamper your feet to the hilt. With a full-length massage footbed and a velcro PU strap atop the forefoot strap to create a customised Fit, there's no better way to comfort your feet all day.Upper Synthetic and mildly padded fabric strap with perforations for breathability and comfort Velcro PU flap with Circular perforations to create a snug midfoot fit Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Full-length EVA footbed with circular nubs along the length of the footbed and forefoot, with longer lugs along the sides from the midfoot to the heel for massaged comfort Footbed raised with a toe guard and heel guard to protect the foot and for durability Outsole TPR outsole for durability Elongated lugs on the forefoot, heel and medial and lateral sides for greater grip and traction even on wet terrain Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean clothDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
